name: Bank Statement Reconciliation
description: Import bank statements from PDF (email or file), AI-extract transactions, auto-match to cashbook, post unmatched entries, reconcile.

accounting_system.description: Connection to Opera SQL SE or equivalent accounting database

email.purpose: Scan inbox for bank statement PDFs, archive processed emails
email.description: IMAP for receiving statements by email

ai_extraction.purpose: Extract transactions from bank statement PDFs
ai_extraction.description: Gemini Vision API for PDF text extraction and transaction parsing

settings.label: Statement Folder Path
settings.description: Local folder to scan for bank statement PDFs

data_stores.description: Learned payee name to Opera account mappings
Cached PDF extraction results by content hash

locking_rules.bank_import_lock: Application-level lock per bank account — prevents concurrent imports to same bank
locking_rules.sequence_allocation: UPDLOCK, ROWLOCK on nparm, atype, nextid when posting transactions
locking_rules.balance_update: ROWLOCK on nbank, sname, pname, nacnt when updating balances
locking_rules.deadlock_retry: All posting wrapped in execute_with_deadlock_retry (3 attempts)
locking_rules.record_lock_check: Checks for Opera application-level locks before posting (prevents conflict with Opera users)
locking_rules.duplicate_detection: ABS(ABS(at_value) - amount) with date range check before posting
